title: carex alliiformis
intro: Carex alliiformis, also known as onion sedge, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carex alliiformis include alleviating congestion, reducing fever, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, onion sedge is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a natural remedy in capsules or powder form.
